title: NovoJuris Legal acts on DrinkPrime Series A fundraise
description: Waterwala Labs Private Limited, dba DrinkPrime, has raised $2.2 million from a Series A fundraise led by Artha Continuum Fund and Mirabilis Investment Trust.NovoJuris Legal advised DrinkPrime on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted of Ashwin Bhat (Deputy Managing Partner), Amol Chitnis (Junior Partner), Associates Anjana Hegde and Nunsavath Jay Datta Sai.Managing Partner Sharda Balaji provided her strategic inputs on this transaction.DrinkPrimeFounded in 2016 by Vijender Reddy Muthyala
